patch.value:
## Context

Project management is context management. Integration tests must prove package activation without consuming unrelated operator context.

## Scope

Isolate the package lifecycle smoke test and verify the full release contract.
Isolate package-install integration tests from the user's pm home

The package activation smoke test only redirected PM_GLOBAL_PATH, leaving HOME and XDG state shared with the operator. A real install test must be hermetic so it cannot read or mutate personal/global pm configuration.

The package install smoke test runs with temporary HOME, XDG_CONFIG_HOME, and XDG_DATA_HOME directories; all activation/generate/check assertions pass against pm CLI 2026.7.10; the full release gate passes in a clean environment.
Current origin/main is checked out; latest pm CLI dependency is installed; no unrelated working-tree changes exist.
Run the package-install test while a real ~/.pm-cli configuration exists and observe that only PM_GLOBAL_PATH is redirected.
Integration tests are fully isolated from operator home/config/data.
The test inherits HOME and XDG paths and can observe global state.
Prevents tests and review bots from coupling to or modifying private user configuration.

value.author: codex
value.text: Discovered while manually running the full release gate against real local pm data.

value.author: codex
value.text: Use temporary HOME and XDG roots rather than only PM_GLOBAL_PATH because package lifecycle state spans standard user directories.

value.author: codex
value.text: Package integration tests must isolate both product-specific globals and standard HOME/XDG locations to avoid privacy leaks and nondeterminism.

patch.value: 128 tests passed, package install/doctor/generate/check flows succeeded, npm audit found 0 vulnerabilities, pack dry-run succeeded, and pm-changelog reported the changelog current.
The package install integration test cannot read or write operator-level pm configuration and the complete release gate passes.
Replaced the package smoke test's product-specific global override with temporary HOME, XDG_CONFIG_HOME, and XDG_DATA_HOME roots shared across every spawned pm command.
Hermetic HOME/XDG isolation implemented and the complete release gate passed on pm CLI 2026.7.10.

value.author: codex
value.text: Greptile P2 accepted: spreading process.env could preserve an operator-exported PM_GLOBAL_PATH. The test now overrides PM_GLOBAL_PATH to a temporary path in addition to HOME and XDG directories.

value.author: codex
value.text: When constructing a hermetic child environment, overriding HOME/XDG is insufficient if product-specific path variables can be inherited; explicitly replace every supported storage-root override after spreading process.env.

author: codex-root

value.author: codex-root
value.text: Regression reproduced on 2026-07-14: npm run release:check sets INIT_CWD to the source repository. The integration test spreads process.env into child pm commands,so pm resolves the source workspace instead of the temporary workspace,loads unrelated extensions,emits collision warnings,and creates .agents/pm/extensions in the source tree. A control probe with INIT_CWD unset reports zero warnings; the same probe with INIT_CWD set reproduces all eight warnings.

message: Reopen hermetic install issue for npm INIT_CWD regression

author: codex-root
message: Claim regression fix and full release verification

author: codex-root

value.author: codex-root
value.text: Hermetic pm integration tests must isolate both axes of context: PM_GLOBAL_PATH for global package state and PM_PATH for the project tracker. HOME/XDG isolation alone does not prevent nearest-ancestor workspace discovery in shared temporary directories.

value.author: codex-root
value.text: Root-cause correction after a controlled second probe: INIT_CWD was a real inherited context hazard,but the immediate collision source was ancestor workspace discovery. /tmp already contains a pm tracker,so pm init in /tmp/pm-changelog-install-* reused /tmp/.agents/pm and loaded its ten project extensions. Pinning PM_PATH to the test directory removes all eight warnings. The child environment remains allowlisted so INIT_CWD,npm lifecycle metadata,and registry tokens cannot leak into the integration process.

patch.value: The package-install smoke test pins a temporary PM_PATH and PM_GLOBAL_PATH, uses isolated HOME/XDG/user-profile roots, and does not inherit npm lifecycle or credential-bearing environment state; The activation/generate/check assertions pass when /tmp is already a pm workspace and INIT_CWD points at the source checkout; The full release gate passes against the repository-locked latest pm CLI SDK

message: Correct regression root cause and strengthen hermetic acceptance criteria

author: codex-root

patch.value: Full release gate with isolated npm user config

message: Link the hermetic full release gate as durable verification evidence

author: codex-root

patch.value: 134 tests passed, including real package install/doctor/generate/check flows; typecheck and build passed; npm audit found 0 vulnerabilities; npm pack dry-run passed; pm-changelog reported CHANGELOG.md current.
The package-install integration test cannot discover ancestor/operator pm context or inherit npm lifecycle/credential state, and the complete release gate passes.

Pinned project PM_PATH and global PM_GLOBAL_PATH to the temporary fixture; replaced process.env spreading with an operating-system/network allowlist so npm lifecycle metadata and registry credentials cannot reach child pm commands; updated the locked pm CLI to 2026.7.13.

Run NPM_CONFIG_USERCONFIG=/dev/null npm run release:check while /tmp/.agents/pm exists; before the fix, the package-install fixture discovers the ancestor tracker and package doctor reports unrelated extension collisions.
Node 22.19.0, npm 11.17.0, @unbrained/pm-cli 2026.7.13; /tmp contains an ancestor .agents/pm tracker and npm INIT_CWD points to the source checkout

message: Record corrected root cause and final release-gate evidence

author: codex-root
message: Link dependency alignment files to the hermetic integration fix

patch.value: Hermetic PM_PATH and PM_GLOBAL_PATH isolation plus an allowlisted child environment eliminate ancestor/operator context leakage; the latest-CLI full release gate passes all 134 tests.

author: codex-root
message: Release completed hermetic integration-test work for review

author: codex-root

value.author: codex-root
value.text: Pre-push Greptile review 9b6f4fa2-f517-4e9e-9186-c334f7a3f50b P2 accepted: the original allowlist assertions were invariants but did not prove sanitization of hostile input. The regression now injects inherited INIT_CWD, PM_PATH, PM_GLOBAL_PATH, and NODE_AUTH_TOKEN sentinels, then proves lifecycle/credential values are removed and pm roots are replaced. Full release gate remains green: 134/134 tests and 0 production vulnerabilities.

message: Record and resolve pre-push Greptile feedback

patch.value: Release tag-history precondition for reproducible changelog checks

value.author: codex-root
value.text: GitHub PR 67 feedback disposition: CodeRabbit exact PM_GLOBAL_PATH assertion accepted. Gemini cross-platform concern partially accepted by inheriting only locale/SystemDrive inputs and binding APPDATA, LOCALAPPDATA, TEMP, TMP, and TMPDIR to fixture roots; inherited NODE_OPTIONS, NODE_ENV, terminal, proxy, certificate, credential, and user-config variables remain intentionally excluded. Sourcery maintainability feedback produced an explicit allowlist policy comment; helper extraction is deferred because this is a single test-only call site. Greptile tagless-sandbox P1 was independently reproduced, documented as a release-gate precondition, and tracked separately as pmc-yzho for precise missing-context diagnostics.

author: codex-root

value.author: codex-root
value.text: Gemini second-round cleanup finding accepted: the package-install integration test now receives the node:test context and registers t.after() recursive fixture cleanup, matching existing repository test patterns. Full release gate remains green with 134/134 tests and 0 production vulnerabilities.

message: Record and resolve temporary fixture cleanup feedback

patch.value: 135 tests passed, including Windows case-insensitive environment lookup and real package install/doctor/generate/check flows; typecheck and build passed; npm audit found 0 vulnerabilities; npm pack dry-run passed; pm-changelog reported CHANGELOG.md current.

author: codex-root

patch.value: Hermetic cross-platform storage and environment isolation plus deterministic fixture teardown are implemented; the latest-CLI release gate passes all 135 tests.

value.author: codex-root
value.text: Gemini final-round Windows casing finding accepted: readEnvironmentValue preserves Windows case-insensitive system-variable lookup while retaining POSIX case sensitivity, with a synthetic regression test. Full release gate passes 135/135.

patch.value: Pinned project PM_PATH, global PM_GLOBAL_PATH, home, XDG, Windows app-data, and temporary roots to the fixture; replaced process.env spreading with a typed platform-aware allowlist that excludes lifecycle, code-loading, proxy, user-config, and credential state; added deterministic teardown; updated the locked pm CLI to 2026.7.13.

message: Finalize cross-platform review resolution and evidence
